name: Pause gate covers prove and finalize
local_question: Can any withdrawal proof or finalization path bypass `_assertNotPaused()`?
duplicate_gate_notes: Not a claim unless bypass is concrete and not a privileged-only/admin scenario.
quality_gate_notes: Requires exact call path, affected state, and local reproduction plan.

name: Unsafe targets remain blocked
local_question: Can a withdrawal reach the portal itself, ETHLockbox, or an equivalent unsafe target through an alternate path?
duplicate_gate_notes: Must avoid the documented direct-implementation stranded-funds issue unless a new bypass exists.
quality_gate_notes: Needs target classification and proof of direct protocol impact.

name: Dispute game eligibility is complete
local_question: Are all invalid dispute-game states rejected both during proof and finalization readiness checks?
duplicate_gate_notes: Must clear op-dispute-mon and proof-of-whale exclusions before promotion.
quality_gate_notes: Needs exact game state matrix and local fixture plan.

name: Output-root and withdrawal inclusion binding
local_question: Can output-root proof data and withdrawal storage proof data become inconsistent without reverting?
duplicate_gate_notes: Must avoid upstream/known fault-proof issue overlap.
quality_gate_notes: Needs local proof data fixture and expected revert/success assertions.

name: Proof submitter isolation
local_question: Can one proof submitter reset block or finalize another submitter's valid withdrawal proof unexpectedly?
duplicate_gate_notes: Check existing multiple-proof design rationale before any claim.

name: Replay protection before external call
local_question: Is `finalizedWithdrawals` always set before external target execution and can any revert/estimation path unwind assumptions?
duplicate_gate_notes: Do not claim generic reentrancy without a concrete bypass of replay and l2Sender guards.

name: l2Sender guard and reset
local_question: Can `l2Sender` remain non-default or be observed incorrectly across nested/failing finalization paths?
duplicate_gate_notes: Privileged or target-contract-only behavior is not enough without direct in-scope impact.
quality_gate_notes: Needs success/failure target matrix and state assertions.

name: ETHLockbox accounting on failed withdrawal target call
local_question: When ETHLockbox mode is enabled, is ETH unlocked, used, and re-locked correctly across failed calls?
duplicate_gate_notes: Must distinguish direct accounting bug from chain/operator configuration issue.
quality_gate_notes: Needs local accounting invariant and failure-path fixture plan.

name: Deposit gas and calldata bounds
local_question: Do minimum gas, calldata length, creation target, and address aliasing checks prevent unpaid or misattributed L2 resource usage?
duplicate_gate_notes: Large data/gas griefing is a documented exclusion unless a distinct new impact exists.

name: Custom gas token value restriction
local_question: Are ETH value paths fully blocked when custom gas token mode is active?
duplicate_gate_notes: Configuration-only claims are weak unless they show direct protocol code impact.
quality_gate_notes: Needs mode matrix and value-flow proof plan.
